name: The Wardens Exam
description: "You have recently been ranked up to a higher warden, and you're about to participate in an exam in order to become a real warden. but you notice some of the Warden acadamies well-known students, amongst them is Opra, Pienarry, Deca, Vineval, Excavous, Moxious, Toi'Toi, Arkius, and Pixelia. The Door's opens, and you're transported to an large empty continent... the Exam as begun, and your goal is to be one of the ten remaining ones, in order to pass the exam."
creator: Rozora
